summary: Calls Module (Phase 6 Strangler Fig) testing completed. All 31 backend API tests passed, 2 skipped. The new modular calls routes from /app/backend/routes/calls.py are working correctly with USE_NEW_CALLS_ROUTES=true.
critical_code_review_comments: Calls module extraction is clean and follows Strangler Fig pattern correctly
routes/calls.py properly imports from services/call_service.py and services/auth_service.py
Feature flag USE_NEW_CALLS_ROUTES=true correctly routes to new modular calls routes
User isolation is properly enforced - users can only access their own calls
All READ operations work correctly: list calls, get single call, analytics, AMD status
Tier-restricted endpoints (recording, transcript) properly check user tier features
Service injection pattern (set_services) properly injects get_tier_features_fn, twilio_service, twilio_phone_number, recording_service
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from responses using {'_id': 0} projection
Analytics calculation in call_service.py correctly handles date ranges (7d, 30d, 90d, all)
Twilio status endpoint correctly masks phone number for security
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users and calls
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calls module (Phase 6 Strangler Fig) fully tested. New modular routes in /app/backend/routes/calls.py and /app/backend/services/call_service.py are working correctly. Feature flag USE_NEW_CALLS_ROUTES=true in backend/.env enables the new routes. All READ operations tested: list calls, get single call, analytics (7d/30d/90d/all), AMD status, recording, transcript. User isolation verified - users can only see/modify their own calls. Tier restrictions verified - recording requires Starter tier, transcript requires Professional tier. Note: Twilio webhooks and call initiation (/calls/initiate) remain in server.py and were NOT tested as they are out of scope for this extraction.

tests: Phone number is partially masked for security
User cannot access other user's call
User cannot access other user's AMD status
User cannot access other user's recording
User cannot access other user's transcript
Users see only their own calls in list

skipped_tests.TestTierRestrictions::test_free_user_rec: Free trial user has no calls to test
skipped_tests.TestTierRestrictions::test_free_user_tra: Free trial user has no calls to test

not_tested.POST /api/calls/initiate: Remains in server.py - out of scope for Phase 6 extraction
not_tested.Twilio webhooks: Remain in server.py - out of scope for Phase 6 extraction
not_tested.POST /api/calls/{call_id}/transcribe: Requires recording_service background task - not tested
